title: Pageant an Alice in Wonderland extravaganza
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Crawlers and Crowns...
bodyText:
Gallery

GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Crawlers and Crowns Model Academy hosted its Eden SA and Top Model pageant in Mossel Bay.

The event, the theme of which was Alice in Wonderland, was a true extravaganza, with contestants going all-out and dressing beautifully for the theme.

The elaborate costumes meant that the event was like a pantomime.

The variety of outfits was inspiring and make-up was creative and impeccably done.


> See a gallery here:


Pageant an Alice in Wonderland extravaganza

The annual event, organised by Crawlers and Crowns' Karen Gray and Deon Lensing, which took place on 2 November, was well supported.


> All ages welcome


Contestants from young children to pensioner age are invited to enter.

The entrants compete for the Little/Mr/Miss/Mrs Eden SA and Eden SA Top Model titles.

There are also philanthropist prizes, for the contestants who do the most remarkable charity work.

The Eden Protocol Foundation, which works to uplift poor communities in Mossel Bay, benefited from the charity work to channel donations to worthy causes.

This was the seventh annual Crawlers and Crowns pageant and it was held at the Dias Hotel in Mossel Bay.

Meshyla Roux and Darene van der Merwe were the winners of the junior and senior Philanthropist titles.

The junior winners were: Stefano Buitendag (Little Mr Top Model winner), Mika Stoop (Little Miss Eden SA first runner-up and winner of Personality, Photogenic, Eden SA Top Model Little Miss and Junior Overall titles), Chelsea Oosthuizen (Miss Eden SA Little winner, Eden SA Top Model first runner up and winner of Public Choice, Best Ramp and Best Dressed titles).

Lucy-Anne Venter (Teen Miss Eden SA and Teen Eden SA Top Model 2024 winner, Photogenic winner, Best Ramp winner and Senior Overall winner), Eulize du Plessis (Miss Eden SA 18+ winner, Best Interview winner, Miss 18+ Eden SA Top Model winner), Lesley-Rae Coetzer (Mrs Eden SA winner, Mrs Eden SA Top Model winner, Senior Personality winner), Colin du Pisani (Mr Eden SA winner and Mr Eden SA 18+ Top Model winner) and Xander van Wyk (Teen Mr Eden SA winner and second runner-up, Eden SA Top Model, 13-17 years). ‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
